_comment: 0.7.26 — mainline quest after beat_gym_10. Gyms 11-19 are the optional rotating gym set; the canonical mainline progression from gym 10 jumps straight to the Elite Four. 4 rctmod:defeat_count criteria, one per E4 trainer (Lorelei/Cynthia/Agatha/Lance = gyms 20/21/22/23). All 4 are required via the `requirements` list (each criterion in its own inner array = AND). beat_gym_24 (Champion) re-parented to this so the Champion fight is properly gated on completing the full E4 — instead of just beating Lance.

description.text: Travel to /warp elite4 and defeat all four Elite Four members: Lorelei, Cynthia, Agatha, and Lance.
